{"society_power": 8.5, "state_power": 7.0, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": -0.5, "key_event": "Maastricht integration and liberalization erode autonomous national state", "reasoning": "European integration (Maastricht, EMU convergence), privatization, and decentralization transferred and diffused the national state's autonomous power, slightly reducing state capacity, while civil society remained robust\u2014demonstrated by the Maastricht referendum, the 1995 strikes forcing the Jupp\u00e9 retreat, and electoral checks on the executive."}
